playbook.intent: A 1-hour ceremony at sprint start: confirm the goal, pull capacity-fit work, leave with a committed backlog, owner per item, and a sprint goal everyone can repeat.
playbook.scope: A 1-hour ceremony at sprint start: confirm the goal, pull capacity-fit work, leave with a committed backlog, owner per item, and a sprint goal everyone can repeat.

success-criteria.criterion: Sprint goal is a one-line outcome tied to roadmap
Every pulled item has an owner
100% of contributors can restate the goal

stage.name: Lock the goal

tasks.task: Draft the sprint goal as a single sentence the team can repeat
Tie the goal to a roadmap outcome

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the goal is one sentence and tied to an outcome.

stage.name: Capacity check
stage.intent: Lock realistic capacity for this sprint.

tasks.task: Pull team capacity adjusted for PTO + meetings

stage.decision-gate: Advance when capacity has explicit deductions documented.

stage.name: Pull-fit work
stage.intent: Pull from the ready queue against capacity.

tasks.task: Walk the top of the AC-ready queue
Pull items until capacity is reached
Stop pulling when uncertainty rises above threshold

stage.decision-gate: Advance when pulled backlog fits capacity with a small buffer.

stage.name: Owners + dependencies
stage.intent: Lock who does what + what blocks what.

tasks.task: Confirm any cross-team dependencies are already commited by the other side

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every pulled item has an owner.

stage.name: Repeat-back ritual
stage.intent: Confirm the team can repeat the sprint goal.

tasks.task: Ask each contributor to restate the sprint goal in their own words
Capture any divergence as a misalignment risk
Adjust the goal language if 2+ people diverge

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 100% of contributors can restate the goal.

stage.name: Broadcast + log

tasks.task: Post the sprint goal + pulled backlog to the team channel
File the plan in the canonical location
Update stakeholders on the sprint goal

stage.decision-gate: Required: broadcast sent within 30 minutes of planning end.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content facilitate-sprint-planning-end-to-end --format md, agent: faion get-content facilitate-sprint-planning-end-to-end --format context, json: faion get-content facilitate-sprint-planning-end-to-end --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
